title: lyonia ferruginea
intro: Lyonia ferruginea, also known as the rusty stalk or yellow lyonia, is a flowering plant species native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Lyonia ferruginea include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
